calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-12-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Joseph Stinson, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff John Stewart Co.
Francisco G. Torres representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Anthony Miller is present.
Daniel Berko representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 175 Sixth Street, #325, San Francisco California.

This case settled, the trial date of March 17, 2008 is vacated.
